_comment: Weekly content-decay detection hook for the seo-superpower plugin. Pairs with the refreshing-stale-content skill. Reference: https://code.claude.com/docs/en/hooks
_status: DOCUMENTED STUB. SessionStart nudge + UserPromptSubmit manual trigger are wired; CronCreate / RemoteTrigger paths are spec-only and disabled by default. Full automation lands in v3.

SessionStart._description: On session start, check timestamp of last decay sweep. If >7 days old AND a GSC-verified site is configured, surface a one-line nudge in context. Does not auto-execute the sweep.

UserPromptSubmit._description: Listen for the manual trigger phrase. When the user types '/seo refresh' or 'run decay check', append a directive to context that loads the refreshing-stale-content skill and runs the sweep workflow.

scheduled._comment: Two scheduling paths. CronCreate runs in-session (only fires while a Claude Code session is open Monday morning). RemoteTrigger is durable and fires regardless of local session state — recommended for production sites.

CronCreate._description: In-session cron. Runs every Monday 09:00 local time. Only fires if a Claude Code session is active.
CronCreate._note: Disabled by default. Enable per-project once gsc-mcp is verified.

RemoteTrigger._description: Durable scheduled agent. Fires Monday 09:00 UTC. Runs the decay sweep, opens PRs autonomously, posts a summary to the configured channel.

/seo refresh.description: Run the weekly decay sweep manually. Loads refreshing-stale-content skill, queries gsc-mcp for the configured site, identifies pages exceeding the decay thresholds, and proposes a refresh queue. User confirms before any PR is opened.

/seo refresh <url>.description: Skip detection and run the per-page refresh playbook directly on <url>.

expected_behavior.on_session_start_stale: Single-line context nudge appears: 'SEO: decay sweep is 9 days old. Run /seo refresh.' No blocking, no auto-execution.
expected_behavior.on_manual_trigger: Plugin loads refreshing-stale-content skill > queries gsc-mcp for 12-month window > ranks pages by decay severity > presents top N candidates > on user confirm, opens one PR per page with copy edits, dateModified bump, and adjusted internal links > on merge, pings IndexNow.
expected_behavior.on_scheduled_remote: (v3) Same as manual trigger but unattended; respects max_prs_per_run cap; posts summary with PR links.
expected_behavior.thresholds_source: All numeric thresholds match the SKILL.md detection table. Adjust in this file, not in the skill.
